title: FAYDUDU Pop Up Tent for Kids, Starry Kids Tent Indoor & Outdoor Tent, Pink Play Castle Tent Kids Play Tent, Teepee Tent for Kids Girls Toys, 135 x 100cm (Pink)
features: 🛸【Kid’s Private Space】 Our play house is a dreamy space tent. Your kids can stay in it to play hide and seek, building blocks, read comics, take a nap or just snuggle up with toys. 🤩【Your Best Choice】This play tent is durable and is the best choice for outdoor and indoor activities. You can place it in parks, houses, parties, day care places in the backyard. description: Product Description Kids Space Play Tent for kids Every child wants to have their own colorful play space to do anything they want. Our kids play tent is the best choice for your kids when the special day like CHILDREN'S DAY, BIRTHDAY is coming. Exquisite patterns, meticulous workmanship,Give your children a small territory of their own This is a wonderful activity center play area for children to rest, read books, pretend play, store and play. Children can invite their parents or small partners to visit their secret base,increase parent-child interaction and promote friendship. Specifications： Colour: Pink/ Blue Material: Polyester, Fiberglass Poles Product Size: 100cm x 100cm x 135cm NOTE: 1.Do not do intense movements in the tent when using it. 2.Keep away from fire when using. 3.Be sure to use the merchandise in the presence of the guardian. 4.Play balls and dolls shown in the pictures are not included inside package. 5.This product doesn't include string lights. Great for Indoor & Outdoor Play: It is a perfect home away from home, ideal for bedroom, playroom, backyard or any space for that matter. It’s also a comfortable shelter for outdoor trips. Product Features A rolled-up curtain The door curtain can be lowered to provide privacy for children, and for easy access and interaction, the door curtain can also be rolled up and tied with a rope. Large light mesh windows Two mesh window design assuring a better and safer ventilation environment. Solid Construction Long poles support the top, middle and bottom parts to offer great stability and additional safety for kids at play.Assembly requires no tools and no small part. Easy assembly The lightweight pop up tent can be opened and set up in just a few minutes. It can also be compactly packed away in the included carry bag for storage or travel. Your Best Choice It's a perfect birthday or Christmas choice, or just a surprise to your children. This kids pop up tents are suitable children of all age. Whatever girls or boys, they all will love it. It's a great place to hide-and-seek, or a quiet space to rest or read, or just crawl around.
